testcase.name: testBluetoothPairing
testcase.failure: Expected: pairing state BONDED Actual: pairing state BOND_NONE Device reported error code 0x05 (authentication failure) after PIN exchange.

testcase.name: testAutoReconnect

failure.message: Device did not reconnect after signal drop

testcase.failure: Expected: reconnected within 5000ms Actual: no reconnection after 15000ms Signal was dropped for 2000ms then restored to full strength.

testcase.name: testVolumeControl
testcase.failure: Expected volume at step 8: 50% (+/- 2%) Actual volume at step 8: 37% Volume curve deviated from target profile by more than 10%.

testcase.name: testFirmwareApply

failure.message: Firmware apply failed with verification error

testcase.failure: Expected: firmware version 2.3.0 active after reboot Actual: device stuck in bootloader mode Flash write completed but signature verification returned INVALID.
